name: Mrs Fields Mocha Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Instant coffee crystals (French roast or other)
10 ounces Semisweet chocolate bar, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a small bowl, dissolve coffee crystals in coffee liqueur and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, blend white sugar and dark brown sugar with an electric mixer at medium speed until combined.
5. Add butter to the sugar mixture and mix until a grainy paste forms. Scrape down sides of the bowl.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in dissolved coffee crystals.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture and chocolate chunks to the sugar-butter mixture, blending just until combined. Do not overmix.
8. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 23-25 minutes. Immediately transfer cookies with a spatula to a cool, flat surface.
